channel_title: AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones
title: This model is better than ChatGPT and 10x cheaper
executive_summary: DeepSeek V3 is a groundbreaking AI model developed with only $5.5 million in training costs, significantly less than the estimated $100 million for GPT-4. This model uses only 37 billion of its 617 billion parameters for specific tasks, making it ten times more efficient than competitors like ChatGPT and Claude. With innovations like DualPipe and multi-token prediction, DeepSeek V3 is set to democratize AI development and drive innovation in the field.
bullets: DeepSeek V3 was trained with just $5.5 million, a fraction of the estimated $100 million for GPT-4. This shows that high-quality AI can be developed affordably, like building a luxury car for the price of a compact one.

The model activates only 37 billion parameters out of a total of 617 billion for any given task. This selective parameter usage makes it ten times more efficient than models like ChatGPT, similar to using only the necessary ingredients in a recipe instead of wasting resources on extras.

DeepSeek employs a technique called DualPipe, which allows the model to learn and work simultaneously. This reduces computational bottlenecks, enabling faster and more cost-effective training, much like a factory running two assembly lines at once to speed up production.

DeepSeek uses multi-token prediction (MTP), predicting two words ahead instead of one. This approach enhances response speed and accuracy, especially in tasks like math and coding, akin to a chess player thinking two moves ahead instead of just one.

The model is trained on high-quality, curated data rather than scraping the internet. This focus on specific areas like English, Chinese, math, and coding ensures superior performance, like a chef using only the finest ingredients to create a gourmet dish.

DeepSeek V3 is open-sourced, allowing anyone to access and customize the model. This democratization of AI development means startups and individual developers can innovate without the heavy financial burden, similar to how open-source software has transformed the tech landscape.

The shift towards affordable AI development signifies a major change in the industry, making advanced AI accessible to more players. This competition can drive innovation beyond the traditional tech giants, like a new bakery opening up in a town dominated by one large chain.

DeepSeek V3's efficiency and affordability could lead to a surge in AI applications across various sectors. If more businesses can afford to implement AI, it could revolutionize industries like healthcare and education, much like how the internet transformed communication.

The model's high-quality training data is focused on specific domains, which enhances its performance. This is like a student studying only the most relevant materials for an exam instead of trying to learn everything at once.

DeepSeek's innovations in AI economics mean that the cost of developing advanced AI is decreasing. If this trend continues, we could see a future where cutting-edge technology is available to everyone, like how smartphones became accessible to the masses.

Nate B. Jones emphasizes that DeepSeek didn't just build an AI model; they 'rewrote the economics of AI development.' This statement highlights the transformative impact of their approach on the industry.

The model's advancements in math and coding performance showcase its capabilities in specialized tasks. This is akin to an athlete excelling in their sport due to targeted training rather than general fitness.
key_takeaways: Aim to develop AI models with a budget similar to DeepSeek's $5.5 million. This approach can make your project more feasible and competitive, especially against models like GPT-4 that cost significantly more.

Incorporate selective parameter usage in your AI projects. By activating only the necessary parameters, you can improve efficiency and reduce costs, much like a chef using only essential ingredients for a dish.

Utilize techniques like DualPipe in your AI training processes. This will allow for simultaneous learning and working, speeding up development and reducing costs, which is crucial in a competitive landscape.

Implement multi-token prediction strategies in your AI models. This can enhance response speed and accuracy, especially in coding and math tasks, giving you an edge over competitors who use traditional methods.

Focus on curating high-quality training data for your AI models. This will ensure better performance and reliability, similar to how a student who studies the right materials performs better on tests.
Consider open-sourcing your AI projects to foster innovation and collaboration. This can lead to broader applications and improvements, making your work more impactful in the community.

technical_terms.DeepSeek V3: A new AI model developed with significantly lower training costs and higher efficiency than existing models. Think of it like a high-performance sports car built at a fraction of the usual price.
technical_terms.DualPipe: A technique that allows an AI model to learn and perform tasks simultaneously, reducing delays in processing. Think of it like a multitasking chef who can cook and prep ingredients at the same time.
technical_terms.Multi-Token Prediction (MTP): A method where the AI predicts two words ahead instead of one, improving response time and accuracy. Like a chess player who anticipates multiple moves in advance instead of just the next one.
technical_terms.Parameters: Variables in an AI model that can be adjusted to influence its behavior and performance. Think of them like the settings on a washing machine that determine how clean your clothes will get.
technical_terms.Curated Data: Carefully selected and organized information used to train AI models, ensuring quality and relevance. Like a librarian choosing only the best books for a library collection.
technical_terms.Open Source: Software that is made available for anyone to use, modify, and distribute. Think of it like a community garden where everyone can contribute and benefit from the shared resources.
technical_terms.AI Economics: The financial aspects and cost structures involved in developing and deploying AI technologies. Like the budget of a movie production that determines how many special effects can be included.
technical_terms.Efficiency: The ability to achieve maximum productivity with minimum wasted effort or expense. Think of it like a well-oiled machine that runs smoothly without unnecessary fuel consumption.
technical_terms.Training Costs: The expenses incurred in developing and refining an AI model. Like the costs associated with training an athlete to reach peak performance.
technical_terms.Benchmarking: The process of comparing a model's performance against established standards or other models. Like a race where runners are timed to see who is the fastest.
technical_terms.Coding Performance: The effectiveness of an AI model in understanding and generating code. Think of it like a translator who can accurately convert languages without losing meaning.
technical_terms.Math Performance: The ability of an AI model to solve mathematical problems accurately and efficiently. Like a calculator that provides quick and correct answers to complex equations.
